prsModelContext.plainEnglishMeaning: Cardiometabolic Health PRS is represented as an evidence-boundary package. It can summarize supplied local evidence and references, while marking unsupported personal conclusions unavailable.
prsModelContext.professionalReview: Use qualified professional review for cardiometabolic screening, prevention, medication, and lifestyle decisions; this synthetic local result is not enough for those decisions.

professionalReview: Use this local result as educational context for cardiometabolic polygenic risk score context, not as a decision tool.
Collect validated source output, source provenance, and relevant clinical or professional context before using Cardiometabolic Health PRS for personal decisions.
Discuss cardiometabolic screening, prevention, medication, and lifestyle decisions with qualified professionals when those choices matter.

missingInputs: Authenticated Sequencing.com sample report sections and rows for Cardiometabolic Health PRS.
validated PRS model, score weights, ancestry applicability, calibration evidence, clinical risk factors, labs, blood pressure, medication context, and authenticated sample-report rows

Report unavailable cardiometabolic polygenic score context evidence explicitly; do not estimate ASCVD, diabetes, obesity, lipid, blood pressure, cardiometabolic, absolute, relative, or percentile risk; infer labs, blood pressure, BMI, treatment need, medication need, screening need, prevention plan, risk reclassification, ancestry-insensitive score, low-risk reassurance, or clinical actionability.
uncertainty: No validated cardiometabolic polygenic risk score context model with source provenance and professional review is supplied for this local package.
The supplied rows support evidence-boundary education only and should not be treated as a personal prediction or clinical interpretation.
limitations: This validation result uses selected derived evidence only; raw genome data, VCF, FASTQ, BAM, CRAM, and complete callset files are not included.
The package does not recreate unavailable Sequencing.com authenticated report rows or proprietary third-party output for Cardiometabolic Health PRS.
The package does not support: personal cardiometabolic disease-risk estimate; PRS percentile; diagnosis; screening schedule; medication change; diet or supplement prescription.
